title: AllyCraft Vanilla+
description: This is a modpack for handhelds, tested on the Ally X and it runs pretty well for me. The modpack includes Create, Naturalist, Farmer’s Delight and a lot of YUNG's add-on.
body:
Just created a Minecraft modpack that includes a variety of mods like Create, Farmer's Delight, Naturalist, and several add-ons from YUNG. The pack also features Controllify for better control customization, as well a shader: Miniature, which is very very light on performance. The modpack runs smoothly, offering over 100+ FPS without shaders enabled and 80+ whith Miniature at 13w.

And by default, the resource packs are not activated, so you may need to enable them manually. To change the "controller" settings, simply press Escape, go to Mods, select Controllify, and then adjust the settings within the mod's configuration.
